text: Supreme Court considers blocking lawsuits alleging weed killer causes cancer - The Washington Post
fullText: Thousands of cancer victims allege Roundup was responsible for their illness, in one of the largest waves of product liability litigation in U.S. history.

text: DeSantis unveils new GOP-friendly congressional map on eve of special session - Politico
fullText: Florida is one of the final states moving ahead on mid-decade redistricting, a process kickstarted last year by President Donald Trump and the White House.

text: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI - The Verge
fullText: Elon Musk’s lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI is going to trial, and we’ll have all the latest updates about the maker of ChatGPT.

text: ‘Michael’ Hits A Higher Note In Global Opening With $218.8M – Box Office Update - Deadline
fullText: Michael came in higher in both its domestic and global take respectively with $97.2M and $218.8M worldwide.

text: Putin pledges support for Iran in talks with FM Araghchi - DW.com
fullText: Russia's Vladimir Putin told Iran's Abbas Araghchi that Iranians would navigate the "difficult period" of war and he hoped for peace soon. Araghchi is visiting Russia at a time when talks with the US remain on hold.

text: White House Correspondents' Association Dinner shooting suspect makes first court appearance - Fox News
fullText: Authorities said Cole Allen prepared a manifesto and shared posts to social media outlining his intent to target Trump administration officials ahead of the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner shooting. Allen is expected to make his first court app…

text: CDC warns of drug-resistant salmonella infections linked to backyard poultry - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
fullText: Federal health officials are investigating an outbreak of salmonella poisoning linked to backyard poultry that has sickened at least 34 people since February

text: South Carolina’s measles outbreak is over after sickening nearly 1,000 people - NBC News
fullText: South Carolina’s measles outbreak — the worst in the U.S. in more than 35 years — is over, state health officials declared Monday

text: Feds Charge Indiana Woman Who Bought Gun Used In Swedish Hospital Shooting - Block Club Chicago
fullText: Olivia Burgos told agents Saturday that she bought the gun for her boyfriend, who is barred from legally possessing guns because of a prior felony conviction.

text: 2026 NFL Mock Draft Grades: Scoring the Experts - Bleeding Green Nation
Taylor Swift files to trademark voice and image after AI concerns - BBC
fullText: Star lodges applications for a photo and two audio clips in apparent attempt to protect her image and voice.

text: Valve launches the Steam Controller without the Steam Machine - The Verge
fullText: Valve is releasing the Steam Controller on May 4th for $99. It was originally designed alongside the Steam Machine, but will now launch separately.

text: Winnipeg Blue Bombers have Diego Pavia on their negotiation list - NBC Sports
fullText: If the NFL doesn't work out for quarterback Diego Pavia, he'll have options in other leagues.

text: CDC delay of infant hepatitis B shot likely to raise infections, studies show - The Washington Post
fullText: Federal vaccine advisers to Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. voted in December to recommend delaying the first shot until at least two months of age for infants born to mothers who test negative for the virus.

text: ‘The Voice’ Contestant Dylan Carter Dies at 24 in Car Accident - Variety
fullText: 'The Voice' contestant Dylan Carter died in a car accident. He was 24.

text: King Charles’s rare state visit offers U.K. a chance to mend ties with Trump - The Washington Post
fullText: The pageantry began Monday amid heightened security concerns and a growing rift over the Iran war. The U.K. hopes the president’s love of pomp and the king’s “poker face” can help heal their alliance.

text: iPhone Ultra and MacBook Ultra are coming this year, per report - 9to5Mac
fullText: A new report says Apple’s foldable iPhone and touchscreen MacBook Pro will be named ‘iPhone Ultra’ and ‘MacBook Ultra,’ respectively.
